response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level experience in software development, architecture, and leadership, with a strong background in open-source technologies and Linux environments. His leadership roles, technical versatility, and strategic thinking align well with the Head of Development/Tech Lead position. However, his German language proficiency is currently basic, which may require further assessment, and his architecture/strategic consulting experience could benefit from deeper evaluation.
strengths: Extensive senior-level experience in software development, architecture, and team leadership with a proven track record
Strong technical versatility across multiple languages (TypeScript, DLang, Java, Python, etc.) and open-source contributions
Proven ability to mentor teams, optimize systems, and drive strategic initiatives in IT consulting
concerns: German language proficiency is currently at a basic level (needs C1 per requirements)
Limited explicit evidence of high-level IT architecture and strategic consulting experience in the resume
Some roles focus more on implementation than leadership or architectural oversight
